prompt: Create a high-energy futuristic cyberpunk advertising poster for {argument name="brand name" default="Adobe"} {argument name="product name" default="Creative Cloud"}, in a wide 16:9 format, set against a dense neon-lit nighttime megacity with glowing skyscrapers, holographic billboards, wet reflective streets, and a dark purple-blue-black atmosphere. Use an intense synthwave palette of electric magenta, cyan, violet, hot pink, and blue, with glowing edges, digital glitches, scanlines, light streaks, particle sparks, and HUD-style interface accents. At the upper left, place the Adobe logo and the word {argument name="brand name" default="Adobe"} in red, followed by a huge bold techno headline reading {argument name="product name" default="Creative Cloud"} in luminous white and cyan with magenta glow, and beneath it a smaller tagline in all caps: {argument name="tagline" default="7 APPS. ENDLESS POSSIBILITIES."}. Below that, add a short marketing paragraph in compact futuristic type: “POWER YOUR CREATIVITY WITH INDUSTRY-LEADING TOOLS FOR EVERY IDEA AND EVERY CREATOR.” On the upper right, feature a giant glowing rounded-square app icon containing the Adobe Creative Cloud symbol, rendered like a radiant neon hologram with cosmic texture and orange-pink-blue energy inside. Next to it, add a vertical Japanese neon sign reading “創造する、無限の力”. Across the lower middle, display exactly 7 illuminated app cards in a single horizontal row, each as a distinct glowing panel with beveled sci-fi borders, internal circuitry details, and matching neon color accents. Card 1: “Ps”, label “PHOTOSHOP”, subtitle “PHOTO EDITING”, with a simple landscape/image icon, in cyan-blue. Card 2: “Ai”, label “ILLUSTRATOR”, subtitle “VECTOR GRAPHICS”, with a pen-nib/vector icon, in orange-gold. Card 3: “Pr”, label “PREMIERE PRO”, subtitle “VIDEO EDITING”, with a film frame and play button icon, in purple-magenta. Card 4: “Ae”, label “AFTER EFFECTS”, subtitle “MOTION GRAPHICS”, with stacked layered-shapes icon, in violet. Card 5: “Id”, label “INDESIGN”, subtitle “LAYOUT & PUBLISHING”, with a text-layout icon, in pink-red. Card 6: “Lr”, label “LIGHTROOM”, subtitle “PHOTO MANAGEMENT”, with a landscape/photo icon, in cyan-teal. Card 7: “Xd”, label “XD”, subtitle “UI/UX DESIGN”, with a wireframe/app-window icon, in hot pink. Along the very bottom, add a glowing horizontal footer bar with exactly 5 feature blocks separated by thin neon dividers: 1) cloud icon with “SEAMLESS INTEGRATION”, 2) people icon with “BUILT FOR COLLABORATION”, 3) sync/cloud-arrow icon with “SYNC ACROSS DEVICES”, 4) graduation cap icon with “LEARN & GROW WITH CREATIVE CLOUD”, 5) a bold closing slogan at the far right reading {argument name="closing slogan" default="MAKE IT. CREATIVE CLOUD."}. Overall style: premium cinematic tech ad, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, symmetrical promotional layout, glossy reflections, dramatic contrast, retro-futurist game UI aesthetics, polished commercial poster design.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张高能量的未来赛博朋克风格广告海报，用于 {argument name="brand name" default="Adobe"} {argument name="product name" default="Creative Cloud"}，采用 16:9 宽屏格式，背景设定在霓虹闪烁的密集夜间大都市，包含发光的摩天大楼、全息广告牌、潮湿的反射路面以及深紫-蓝-黑色的氛围。使用强烈的合成波色调，包括电光洋红色、青色、紫色、亮粉色和蓝色，并加入发光边缘、数字故障效果、扫描线、光束、粒子火花以及 HUD 风格的界面装饰。在左上角放置 Adobe 标志和红色的 {argument name="brand name" default="Adobe"} 字样，随后是一个巨大的粗体科技风标题，显示为 {argument name="product name" default="Creative Cloud"}，采用发光的白色和青色，并带有洋红色光晕；在其下方添加一行较小的全大写标语：{argument name="tagline" default="7 APPS. ENDLESS POSSIBILITIES."}。在下方，以紧凑的未来感字体添加一段简短的营销文案：“POWER YOUR CREATIVITY WITH INDUSTRY-LEADING TOOLS FOR EVERY IDEA AND EVERY CREATOR.”（用行业领先的工具为每一个创意和每一位创作者赋能）。在右上角，展示一个巨大的发光圆角方形应用图标，内含 Adobe Creative Cloud 符号，渲染成带有宇宙纹理和橙-粉-蓝色能量的璀璨霓虹全息图。在其旁边，添加一个垂直的日文霓虹灯牌，文字为“創造する、無限の力”。在下方中部，横向排列展示 7 张发光的应用卡片，每张卡片都是一个独立的亮光面板，带有斜面科幻边框、内部电路细节和相匹配的霓虹色调。卡片 1：“Ps”，标签“PHOTOSHOP”，副标题“PHOTO EDITING”，配有简单的风景/图像图标，青蓝色。卡片 2：“Ai”，标签“ILLUSTRATOR”，副标题“VECTOR GRAPHICS”，配有钢笔尖/矢量图标，橙金色。卡片 3：“Pr”，标签“PREMIERE PRO”，副标题“VIDEO EDITING”，配有胶片框和播放按钮图标，紫洋红色。卡片 4：“Ae”，标签“AFTER EFFECTS”，副标题“MOTION GRAPHICS”，配有堆叠层形状图标，紫色。卡片 5：“Id”，标签“INDESIGN”，副标题“LAYOUT & PUBLISHING”，配有文本排版图标，粉红色。卡片 6：“Lr”，标签“LIGHTROOM”，副标题“PHOTO MANAGEMENT”，配有风景/照片图标，青蓝绿色。卡片 7：“Xd”，标签“XD”，副标题“UI/UX DESIGN”，配有线框/应用窗口图标，亮粉色。在最底部，添加一个发光的水平页脚栏，包含 5 个由细霓虹分割线隔开的功能块：1) 云图标及“SEAMLESS INTEGRATION”（无缝集成），2) 人像图标及“BUILT FOR COLLABORATION”（专为协作打造），3) 同步/云箭头图标及“SYNC ACROSS DEVICES”（跨设备同步），4) 学士帽图标及“LEARN & GROW WITH CREATIVE CLOUD”（通过 Creative Cloud 学习与成长），5) 最右侧是一个醒目的结束语：{argument name="closing slogan" default="MAKE IT. CREATIVE CLOUD."}。整体风格：高端电影级科技广告，超高细节，清晰锐利，对称式宣传布局，光泽反射，戏剧性对比，复古未来主义游戏 UI 美学，精致的商业海报设计。

breakdown.creativeCore: 赛博朋克风格 Creative Cloud 创意广告海报：一张为 Adobe Creative Cloud 设计的霓虹赛博朋克风宣传海报，非常适合用于重现包含多个应用面板和未来感品牌元素的醒目科技广告图形。
breakdown.subject: 空间
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: symmetrical, layered, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, retro, sci-fi, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
